---
title: "visualization_boyname"
format: html
editor: visual
---
```{r}
install.packages("forcats")
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(forcats)
```

```{r}
df <- read.csv("/Users/jinrikim/Desktop/DSI/visualization/baby_names_male.csv")
```

```{r}
#filter the 15 most popular names in 2024
names_2024 <- df %>%
  filter(Year == 2024) %>%
  arrange(desc(Frequency)) %>%
  head(15)
```

```{r}
names_2024 %>%
  mutate(Name = fct_reorder(Name, Frequency)) %>% # rank names by descending order
  ggplot( aes(x= Name, y = Frequency)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "deepskyblue2", alpha = 0.7, width= 0.6) + coord_flip() + theme_bw() + labs(title = "The 15 most popular baby boy names in 2024") + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) + geom_text(aes(label = Frequency), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.75), size = 3.5, family = "Courier")
```
